affected_pattern: Enterprise customer sees charges that exceed the regulated Universal Service Fund cap
root_cause: USF cap calculated against pre-discount total instead of post-discount total — a change in tax-engine ordering placed USF before the commitment discount, inflating the regulated cap base.
supporting_evidence: SLA Breach RCA Playbook: Tax/Discount Ordering Drift pattern
Tax-engine ordering rule changed in release TAX-2026.02
USF cap formula expects post-discount base per regulator guidance
recommended_action: Restore USF calculation order: discounts first, then USF, then tax
Rerate and refund the over-applied USF
Document ordering invariants with formal test coverage
Notify regulator of correction if required by jurisdiction
